address: University Square, 605 Leland Ave, University City, MO 63130
description:
Experience luxury living at University Square, a prime option for WashU students in the Delmar Loop.

This 7-story building features an on-site Starbucks and an entire floor dedicated to amenities designed for the way you live, study, and recharge. Be among the first to enjoy a fully furnished, newly gut-renovated apartment that blends style, comfort, and convenience.

Newly Gut Renovated & Fully Furnished

Amenities include:
• Fitness center
• Private individual and group study rooms
• Tenant lounge
• Game room
• Theater Room

Soonest Available: June & August 2026

address: Kingsland Courtyard, 608 Kingsland Ave, St. Louis, MO 63130
description:
Be the first to live in this beautifully revitalized historic building!

BOTH INDIVIDUAL ROOM AND PARTIAL / FULL SUITE APPLICATIONS ACCEPTED.

Welcome to Kingsland Courtyard, the only off-campus community near WashU offering true 4 Bed / 4 Bath private suites designed to keep your group together without sacrificing privacy!

On the Delmar Loop. Minutes from WashU. With a campus shuttle stop at your doorstep.

Located just steps from everything University City has to offer, Kingsland Courtyard combines historic character with modern student living. This four-story building features 12 spacious four-bedroom suites, with four suites per floor.

Each bedroom includes:
• A private ensuite bathroom with floor-to-ceiling marble finishes
• A personal kitchenette
• Individual climate control

Every suite also features:
• A full chef's kitchen with granite countertops and stainless-steel appliances
• A large living and dining area
• Access to a floor lounge on each level

The building includes multiple resident lounges with a TV area, bar seating, ping pong, and pool table, plus a landscaped courtyard with large balconies on every floor. All units are fully furnished, making move-in simple and stress-free.

Community when you want it. Privacy when you need it.

FEATURES
In-Unit Free Laundry — No coins, no basement trips. Modern convenience inside every suite.
Modern Kitchen — Granite countertops and stainless-steel appliances, including dishwasher and microwave.
Luxury Bathrooms — Floor-to-ceiling marble, high-pressure rain showers, and glass shower doors.
Central Heat and AC — Stay comfortable year-round.
Sound-Insulated Windows — Enjoy quiet study time when you need it.
Included Appliances — Refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave, dishwasher, and in-unit laundry.

Pricing:
$1,000/bed/mo — 12-month lease
$1,200/bed/mo — 10-month lease
$9,900/semester — Full suite (all 4 beds required)

Soonest Available: June & August 2026

LOCAL on Delmar offers a fully furnished apartment featuring sleek stainless steel appliances, hardwood-style plank flooring, and a 55" Smart TV. Each studio, 1, 2, & 3 bedroom apartment offers private bedrooms and bathrooms, smart locks for added convenience, and modern finishes like quartz countertops and designer style cabinetry. At LOCAL On Delmar, comfort meets contemporary design to elevate your everyday living.

Studio: $1,935–$1,965/mo · 398–430 sqft
1-bed: $2,025–$2,045/mo · 504–549 sqft
2-bed: $1,344–$1,375/mo · 728–754 sqft
3-bed: $1,049–$1,129/mo · 984–1,090 sqft

address: Five-Nine, Kingsbury Ave, University City, MO 63130
description:
GUT-RENOVATED & FULLY FURNISHED

FIVE-NINE is the quintessential WashU off-campus apartment building. The building features four 3-bedroom apartments (12 beds total). Find your Kingsbury address complete with a 6-foot fenced backyard, picnic table, hammock, and fire pit.

INCLUDED FURNITURE — (3) Beds · (3) Mattresses · (3) Dressers · (3) Desks with Chairs · (1) Couch · (1) Coffee Table · (1) End Table · (1) TV Cabinet · (1) Dining Table with (4) Chairs · (3) Bar Stools

IN-UNIT FREE LAUNDRY — Say goodbye to the coins and the dark, dingy basement. Say hello to modern convenience and a full wardrobe.

MODERN KITCHEN — Black Pearl Granite Countertops, Large Breakfast Bar, and Stainless-Steel Appliances, including a Dishwasher and Microwave. The dining table right off the kitchen is the perfect place to host your next dinner party.

MODERN BATHROOM — New Porcelain Tile, Plumbing, Fixtures, and High-Pressure Rain Shower.

HARDWOOD FLOORS — Most new construction these days pass off cheap vinyl floors with wood prints as luxury. We stay true to our historic neighborhood and build with natural materials whenever possible.

CENTRAL HEAT/AC & NEW INSULATED WINDOWS — Stay comfortable throughout the year. We rebuilt this historic building from the inside out to modern standards of comfort.

Experience life in one of St. Louis's most historic buildings, the once coveted Delmonte Theater & Hotel. This urban retreat features a completely re-envisioned modern design around stunning historic architecture. Studio–2BR units available, including unique street-level loft apartments.

Echo is a historic gem built in 1926 and added to the National Register of Historic Places in 2005. Thoughtfully designed 1- and 2-bedroom apartment homes with garage parking, fitness center, and on-site management. Pet friendly.

address: 625 N. Euclid Ave, St. Louis, MO 63108
description: Boutique apartment residence offering studio and two-bedroom loft-style apartments with soaring ceilings and exposed brick. Amenities include hot tub & steam room, clubroom & lounge, fitness center, and garage parking.

Terra at the Grove is an urban oasis for those who love the city and the outdoors. Modern studio, 1-, and 2-bedroom apartment homes with in-unit laundry, a 52,000 sqft courtyard, resort-style pool, fitness & yoga studio, and garage parking.
3-bedroom, 2-bath apartment managed by STL Rental Services. Secure building with off-street parking and in-unit laundry.
